title: Heat stroke emergency cooling priority
summary: Focused extreme medical support for heat stroke emergency cooling priority in offline, delayed-help, or collapse conditions.
content: In Greek summer, heat stroke is a true emergency: confusion, collapse, hot body, seizures, or inability to drink needs rapid cooling and emergency help. This is not medical advice; it is a safety and organization checklist until qualified help is available.
materials: clean water if available. Context: “Heat stroke emergency cooling priority”.
soap or sanitizer. Context: “Heat stroke emergency cooling priority”.
gloves or clean barrier. Context: “Heat stroke emergency cooling priority”.
paper and pen. Context: “Heat stroke emergency cooling priority”.
phone, radio, or messenger — for «Heat stroke emergency cooling priority»
labels for time and symptoms — for «Heat stroke emergency cooling priority»
steps: Move to shade or a cool room immediately.
Call emergency help. Context: “Heat stroke emergency cooling priority”.
Cool with water on skin, fans, wet cloths, and removing excess clothing when safe.
Do not give drink to someone confused, unconscious, or vomiting.
Track time and response to cooling.
warnings: This is not medical advice and it is not a doctor's advice. It is offline emergency organization guidance only. Use local emergency numbers, trained first aid, pharmacists, clinics, doctors, poison centers, and official public-health instructions whenever available. Do not perform surgery, invasive procedures, diagnosis, prescription changes, or medicine dosing from this guide. Treat this as a specific boundary while managing “Heat stroke emergency cooling priority”.

Escalate immediately for trouble breathing, heavy bleeding, unconsciousness, severe pain, chest pain, stroke signs, severe burns, pregnancy danger signs, infants in distress, poisoning, or rapid worsening. Treat this as a specific boundary while managing “Heat stroke emergency cooling priority”.
Do not delay evacuation or professional care to finish a checklist. Treat this as a specific boundary while managing “Heat stroke emergency cooling priority”.
Keep privacy, consent, dignity, and local law in mind even during collapse. Treat this as a specific boundary while managing “Heat stroke emergency cooling priority”.

The helper cannot keep the scene clean or safe during “Heat stroke emergency cooling priority”

title: Severe hypothermia gentle handling
summary: Focused extreme medical support for severe hypothermia gentle handling in offline, delayed-help, or collapse conditions.
content: Severely cold people can be fragile; rough movement, alcohol, and fast unsafe heating can worsen danger. This is not medical advice; it is a safety and organization checklist until qualified help is available.
materials: clean water if available. Context: “Severe hypothermia gentle handling”.
soap or sanitizer. Context: “Severe hypothermia gentle handling”.
gloves or clean barrier. Context: “Severe hypothermia gentle handling”.
paper and pen. Context: “Severe hypothermia gentle handling”.
phone, radio, or messenger — for «Severe hypothermia gentle handling»
labels for time and symptoms — for «Severe hypothermia gentle handling»
steps: Move out of wind and wet conditions.
Handle gently and keep horizontal if possible.
Remove wet clothing only if it can be done without rough movement.
Warm the body core with dry layers, blankets, and shared warm space.
Seek urgent professional help for confusion, shivering stops, weak pulse, unconsciousness, or very cold body.
warnings: This is not medical advice and it is not a doctor's advice. It is offline emergency organization guidance only.
